content.speakerText: You want that to go, or eat in?
expectedAnswers: Takeaway, and could I get a fork as well?
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确回应了用餐方式（to go / eat in）
是否自然使用了场景关键词（to go, eat in, takeaway）

content.speakerText: Are you having this here or taking it with you?
content.speakerTextCn: 您是在这里吃还是外带？
expectedAnswers: Dine-in, please. Could I also get a straw?
Takeaway — and a napkin, if possible.
evaluationCriteria: 是否清晰表达用餐方式
是否使用了恰当的礼貌表达（please, could I...）
是否自然结合了附加请求（如纸巾、吸管）
